item.title: Rane (Madras) Ltd Upgraded to Buy on Strong Fundamentals and Attractive Valuation
item.description: Rane (Madras) Ltd, a small-cap player in the auto components sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Hold to Buy as of 14 May 2026. This change reflects a comprehensive reassessment across four key parameters: quality, valuation, financial trend, and technicals. The upgrade comes amid strong financial results, attractive valuation metrics, and a nuanced technical outlook, signalling renewed investor confidence in the company’s growth prospects. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Varvee Global Ltd Upgraded to Sell: A Detailed Analysis of the Rating Change
item.description: Varvee Global Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Strong Sell to Sell as of 14 May 2026. This shift reflects nuanced changes across four key parameters: Quality, Valuation, Financial Trend, and Technicals, amid a backdrop of mixed financial performance and persistent structural challenges. Time: 7 minutes ago

item.title: Permanent Magnets Ltd Upgraded to Hold as Technicals Improve and Valuation Remains Attractive
item.description: Permanent Magnets Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Electrical Equipment sector, has seen its investment rating upgraded from Sell to Hold as of 14 May 2026. This change reflects a nuanced improvement across technical indicators, valuation metrics, and financial trends, despite flat recent quarterly performance. The company’s stock has outperformed the broader market over the past year, prompting a reassessment of its medium-term prospects. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Oswal Green Tech Downgraded to Strong Sell Amid Mixed Financial and Technical Signals
item.description: Oswal Green Tech Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, has seen its investment rating downgraded from Sell to Strong Sell as of 14 May 2026. This change reflects a complex interplay of technical indicators, valuation concerns, financial trends, and overall quality metrics that collectively weigh on the stock’s outlook despite some recent positive quarterly results. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Bharti Airtel Ltd Upgraded to Hold as Technicals Improve and Financials Remain Robust
item.description: Bharti Airtel Ltd has seen its investment rating upgraded from Sell to Hold as of 14 May 2026, reflecting a nuanced improvement across technical indicators, valuation metrics, financial trends, and overall quality. This shift comes amid a positive quarterly performance and a stabilising technical outlook, signalling cautious optimism for investors in the telecom services sector. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Sangal Papers Ltd Downgraded to Strong Sell Amid Weak Fundamentals and Flat Financials
item.description: Sangal Papers Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Paper, Forest & Jute Products sector, has been downgraded from a Sell to a Strong Sell rating as of 14 May 2026. This revision reflects a combination of flat recent financial performance, deteriorating fundamentals, and heightened risks stemming from elevated debt levels and promoter share pledging. The company’s Mojo Score now stands at a concerning 26.0, underscoring the challenges ahead for investors. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Standard Engineering Technology Ltd Faces Mixed Technical Signals Amid Price Momentum Shift
item.description: Standard Enginnering Technology Ltd, a small-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, has experienced a notable shift in its technical momentum, moving from a mildly bearish trend to a sideways pattern. Despite a recent downgrade from Hold to Sell by MarketsMOJO on 2 March 2026, the stock exhibits a complex interplay of technical indicators that suggest cautious investor sentiment amid volatile price action. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Saven Technologies Ltd Downgraded to Strong Sell Amid Mixed Technicals and Valuation Appeal
item.description: Saven Technologies Ltd has seen its investment rating upgraded from Sell to Strong Sell as of 14 May 2026, driven primarily by improvements in its technical indicators and valuation metrics. Despite ongoing challenges in financial trends and quality assessments, the company’s micro-cap status and recent market movements have prompted a reassessment of its outlook within the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: SignatureGlobal India Ltd Faces Technical Momentum Shift Amid Bearish Signals
item.description: SignatureGlobal India Ltd, a small-cap player in the realty sector, has experienced a notable shift in its technical momentum, signalling a transition from sideways movement to a mildly bearish trend. Despite some bullish indicators on monthly charts, the overall technical landscape suggests caution for investors as the stock price declined by 3.02% on 15 May 2026, closing at ₹867.25. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd Faces Technical Downshift Amid Sharp Price Decline
item.description: Zaggle Prepaid Ocean Services Ltd has experienced a notable shift in its technical momentum, transitioning from a mildly bullish to a mildly bearish trend. This change is underscored by a sharp 20.00% decline in the stock price on 15 May 2026, reflecting growing investor caution amid weakening technical indicators and a challenging market backdrop. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd Shows Bullish Momentum Amid Technical Upgrades
item.description: Ratnaveer Precision Engineering Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, has witnessed a notable shift in its technical momentum, upgrading from a mildly bullish to a bullish trend. This change is underpinned by a series of positive signals across key technical indicators, including MACD, Bollinger Bands, and moving averages, signalling renewed investor interest and potential upside in the stock price. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Pyramid Technoplast Ltd Technical Momentum Shifts Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Pyramid Technoplast Ltd, a micro-cap player in the packaging sector, has experienced a notable shift in its technical momentum, moving from a mildly bullish to a mildly bearish trend. Despite a recent downgrade in its Mojo Grade from Sell to Hold, the stock’s mixed technical indicators and price action suggest a complex outlook for investors navigating the current market environment. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Life Insurance Corporation of India Technical Momentum Shifts Amid Mixed Signals
item.description: Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) has experienced a nuanced shift in its technical momentum, with recent indicators signalling a transition from bearish to mildly bearish trends. Despite a modest day gain of 2.25%, the stock’s technical landscape reveals a complex interplay of bullish and bearish signals across weekly and monthly timeframes, prompting a cautious stance among investors. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd Shows Mildly Bullish Momentum Amid Mixed Technical Signals
item.description: Veranda Learning Solutions Ltd has exhibited a notable shift in price momentum, transitioning from a sideways trend to a mildly bullish stance. Despite mixed signals from key technical indicators such as MACD, RSI, and moving averages, the stock’s recent performance and technical outlook suggest cautious optimism for investors navigating the Other Consumer Services sector. item.title: Krishival Foods Ltd Technical Momentum Shifts Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Krishival Foods Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Other Agricultural Products sector, has experienced a notable shift in its technical momentum, moving from a mildly bullish stance to a sideways trend. Despite a modest day change of -0.11%, the stock’s technical indicators reveal a complex picture of mixed signals, prompting a downgrade in its Mojo Grade from Hold to Sell as of 12 May 2026. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd Sees Technical Momentum Shift Amid Mixed Indicator Signals
item.description: GMR Power & Urban Infra Ltd has experienced a notable shift in price momentum, reflected in a blend of bullish and bearish technical indicators. Despite a strong day change of 8.96%, the stock’s technical parameters reveal a nuanced outlook, with weekly signals turning mildly bullish while monthly indicators remain cautious. This article analyses the recent technical developments, momentum shifts, and their implications for investors in the power sector. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Medplus Health Services Ltd Shows Bullish Momentum Amid Technical Upgrades
item.description: Medplus Health Services Ltd has demonstrated a notable shift in price momentum and technical indicators, upgrading its technical trend from mildly bullish to bullish. This change reflects improving market sentiment and technical strength, positioning the small-cap retailing company favourably against broader benchmarks such as the Sensex. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Latent View Analytics Ltd Faces Bearish Momentum Amid Technical Downgrade
item.description: Latent View Analytics Ltd, a small-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has experienced a notable shift in technical momentum, moving from a mildly bearish stance to a more pronounced bearish trend. Recent technical indicators, including MACD, RSI, and moving averages, signal increasing downside pressure, coinciding with a 2.37% decline in the stock price on 15 May 2026. This article analyses the evolving technical landscape and what it means for investors amid broader market comparisons. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd: Technical Momentum Shifts Signal Cautious Optimism
item.description: Paras Defence and Space Technologies Ltd has experienced a nuanced shift in its technical momentum, reflecting a transition from a strongly bullish stance to a more tempered mildly bullish outlook. This change is underscored by mixed signals from key technical indicators such as MACD, RSI, moving averages, and volume-based metrics, suggesting investors should adopt a cautiously optimistic approach amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Kapston Services Ltd Technical Momentum Shifts Signal Mildly Bullish Outlook
item.description: Kapston Services Ltd has exhibited a notable shift in its technical momentum, transitioning from a bullish to a mildly bullish trend, supported by mixed signals from key indicators such as MACD, RSI, and moving averages. This technical evolution coincides with the company’s impressive return profile, significantly outperforming the Sensex over multiple time horizons. Time: 10 minutes ago
